steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The claim states Claudine has a “strong emotional attachment to the surrounding forests.” The correct quotation must show personal, emotional language about the forests — not just observation or description.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "If I had a Mamma…": Discusses her relationship with her parents, not the forests. ✗
  • Choice B — "No small creatures in those great woods…": Observational description of the woods — no emotional language. ✗
  • Choice C — "And then there are my favorites, the great woods… It makes my heart bleed to see one of those cut down.": “My favorites” shows personal connection; “makes my heart bleed” is explicit emotional distress at their loss. ✓
  • Choice D — "the magnificent woods devour everything…": Describes the woods' dominance of the landscape but does not reveal Claudine's personal feelings about them. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
